content: The phone just connected. The agent is greeting you.
Hi, yes, I'm calling because I need to cancel my appointment that I have coming up next week.
The agent said: Recorded for quality and training purposes. But
Okay, that's fine with me.
The agent said: Calling Kettle Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?
No, this is Maria Gonzalez. I need to cancel an appointment I have scheduled for next week due to a work conflict.
The agent said: Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient. You are calling about.
It's Maria Gonzalez, and my date of birth is November 22, 1983.
The agent said: Just to confirm, I have your name as Maria Gonzalez and your date of birth as November 22nd 1983. Is that correct?
Yes, that's correct.
The agent said: Can you please spell?
M-A-R-I-A G-O-N-Z-A-L-E-Z.
The agent said: Could you please spell your first? And last name for me?
Sure — first name: M-A-R-I-A, last name: G-O-N-Z-A-L-E-Z.
The agent said: Would you like to use the phone number to help? Look up your record if so, please provide the number you have on file with us.
Yes, that would help — my phone number is 650-555-0276.
The agent said: Please provide the full phone number. You have on file with us.
The agent said: I have your phone number at 650-555-0276 and your date of birth as November 22nd 1983.
Yes, that's all correct.
The agent said: I can't proceed further right now but I can make sure our Clinic support team follows up with you.
Okay, that works. When do you think they'll be able to reach me to cancel my appointment?
The agent said: Patient support. Connecting you to a representative.
Alright, thank you for transferring me.
The agent said: Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.
Goodbye.
